description_long: This is an upright piano with a light gray finish, positioned against a gray wall and set on a light wood floor. The piano features a full keyboard with alternating white and black keys, and a matching bench is placed in front of it. On top of the piano sits a decorative yellow vase with a branch, adding a touch of elegance. Above the piano, a framed abstract artwork with black shapes and an orange border is mounted on the wall. The piano's legs are slender and slightly tapered, and the overall design is clean and modern. No visible brand or logo is present, and the piano appears to lack visible pedals.
description: A light gray upright piano with a matching bench, decorative vase, and framed artwork above, set against a gray wall on a wood floor.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full keyboard, matching bench, decorative vase on top, and framed artwork above.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the depth of the piano, the vase on top, and the bench in front.
description_view_2: Top-down view showing the arrangement of the piano, bench, vase, and artwork relative to the wall and floor.
description_view_3: Right side view displaying the piano's side profile, the vase, and the bench's position.
attribute_keyboard_layout: Standard keyboard layout with alternating white and black keys, approximately 52 white and 36 black keys, no notable missing or non-standard features.
